/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/test_menus.dir/test_menus_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_menus.dir/test_menus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_menus.dir/__/common/MenuAdapter.cpp.o -o test_menus  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
